name: HR finance teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement requests/month tool
description: For HR finance teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement requests/month, inaccurate tracking causes financial discrepancies. We provide automated anomaly detection instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Inaccurate tracking of employee reimbursement requests
